# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    # Read all input values into a list
    input_values = []
    for line in sys.stdin:
        input_values.append(int(line.strip()))
    
    # Reverse the list for output
    reversed_values = input_values[::-1]
    
    # Print each value in reversed order
    for value in reversed_values:
        print(value)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
